title: BEM-891 worker inboxes
objective:
Run script:
"""
for p in ['governance/dispatch','governance/worker/inbox/WRK-C1','governance/worker/inbox/WRK-C2','governance/worker/inbox/WRK-C3','governance/tools','governance/reports','governance/runtime/curator_dispatch']:
    Path(p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
queue_path = Path('governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl')
items = [json.loads(x) for x in queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if x.strip()] if queue_path.exists() else []
delivered = []
errors = []
for item in items:
    contour = item.get('target_contour')
    if contour not in ['WRK-C1','WRK-C2','WRK-C3']:
        errors.append(item.get('dispatch_id','unknown') + ': invalid target contour')
        continue
    item['status'] = 'delivered'
    item['delivered_at_utc3'] = '2026-05-30T06:46:00+03:00'
    inbox_file = Path('governance/worker/inbox') / contour / (item.get('dispatch_id','dispatch') + '.json')
    inbox_file.write_text(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
    delivered.append(str(inbox_file))
queue_path.write_text('\n'.join(json.dumps(i, ensure_ascii=False) for i in items) + ('\n' if items else ''), encoding='utf-8')

lifecycle = {'status':'active','worker':'OBJ-WRK-001','contours':['WRK-C1','WRK-C2','WRK-C3'],'delivery_rule':'dispatch queue item is delivered to governance/worker/inbox/<contour>/<dispatch_id>.json','delivered_count':len(delivered),'errors':errors}
Path('governance/state/worker_contour_lifecycle.json').write_text(json.dumps(lifecycle, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

tool = '''# BEM-891 worker inbox delivery validator
import json
from pathlib import Path
queue = Path("governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl")
errors = []
items = [json.loads(x) for x in queue.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines() if x.strip()]
for item in items:
    contour = item.get("target_contour")
    inbox = Path("governance/worker/inbox") / contour / (item.get("dispatch_id") + ".json")
    if item.get("status") != "delivered":
        errors.append(f"{item.get('dispatch_id')}: not delivered")
    if not inbox.exists():
        errors.append(f"{item.get('dispatch_id')}: inbox file missing")
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/validate_worker_inboxes.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
status = 'PASS' if not errors and delivered else 'FAIL'
Path('governance/reports/BEM891_WORKER_INBOX_DELIVERY.md').write_text('# BEM-891 Worker contour inbox delivery\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nDelivered: ' + str(len(delivered)) + '\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM891_WORKER_INBOX_DELIVERY_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-891 worker inbox delivery proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nDelivered: ' + str(len(delivered)) + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl','governance/state/worker_contour_lifecycle.json','governance/tools/validate_worker_inboxes.py','governance/reports/BEM891_WORKER_INBOX_DELIVERY.md',str(marker)] + delivered)
ops_applied.append('BEM891 worker inbox delivery ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
